title: Not in clause get wrong result
description:
Not in clause get wrong result
How to repeat:
drop table t;
create table t(a int);
insert into t values(1),(2),(3),(4);
 SELECT  ( 2, 2 ) NOT IN 
 ( select 5,5 union select 7,7 union select null,null  )  as field1
 from t;

+--------+
| field1 |
+--------+
|   NULL |
|      1 |
|      1 |
|      1 |
+--------+
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t(a INT, b VARCHAR(10), c DATE);
SELECT (1, 'test1') NOT IN (SELECT 5, 'test5' UNION SELECT 6, 'test6' UNION SELECT NULL, NULL) AS field1 FROM t;
SELECT (2, 'test2') NOT IN (SELECT 5, 'test5' UNION SELECT NULL, NULL) AS field2 FROM t;
SELECT * FROM t WHERE a NOT IN (SELECT 5 UNION SELECT NULL);
key_bug_features: NOT IN clause with tuples returns incorrect results
